10:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rotation"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"To rotate encryption keys:"}]
12:["$","$L1a",null,{"code":"# 1. Export with old key\nmem = Memory(encryption_key=old_key)\nmem.export(\"export.json\")\n\n# 2. Import with new key\nmem2 = Memory(encryption_key=new_key)\nmem2.import_(\"export.json\")\n\n# 3. Verify\nassert mem2.stats().working_count == mem.stats().working_count\n","language":"python"}]

Store keys in a password manager, HSM, or secure key management service. There is no backdoor."}]}]]}]]}]}]
